task.summary: Fixed circle dependency. Added Icons for player bar. Created card factory class. Changed db retrieval to eager. Added recently played menu. Styled ImportController.
fix: wrap getOrGenerateYearReport in SERIALIZABLE transaction to prevent TOCTOU race condition on (user_id, year) unique constraint; catch DataIntegrityViolationException as fallback;
Entity classes and Repository interfaces created for weekly and monthly reports. Doubly Linked List data structure class created for pagination.

Created service classes to generates/retrieves summaries. SRP Created ListeningHistoryService to manage listening history with DoublyLinkedList pagination.SRP Created generic pagination service ListeningPaginationService<T> to wrap results in DoublyLinkedList<T>.OCP Created view models to load reports with async callback and to wrap pagination data. LSP

v1.0.1 - Album.artists was never populated during import, so album_artists stayed empty Code fix: Store resolved artists in a variable, add them to album.getArtists(), and save the album on the owning side
migration query to populate album_artists from the existing song_artists data.
Bug fix: Completed songs now have boolean value true
v1.0.2: Readme and updates for responsive design

MESSAGE.value: fix: wrap getOrGenerateYearReport in SERIALIZABLE transaction to prevent TOCTOU race condition on (user_id, year) unique constraint; catch DataIntegrityViolationException as fallback;
Entity classes and Repository interfaces created for weekly and monthly reports. Doubly Linked List data structure class created for pagination.

Created service classes to generates/retrieves summaries. SRP Created ListeningHistoryService to manage listening history with DoublyLinkedList pagination.SRP Created generic pagination service ListeningPaginationService<T> to wrap results in DoublyLinkedList<T>.OCP Created view models to load reports with async callback and to wrap pagination data. LSP

v1.0.1 - Album.artists was never populated during import, so album_artists stayed empty Code fix: Store resolved artists in a variable, add them to album.getArtists(), and save the album on the owning side
migration query to populate album_artists from the existing song_artists data.
Bug fix: Completed songs now have boolean value true
v1.0.2: Readme and updates for responsive design
